changes_made: Replaced verbose generic SKILL.md (573 lines) with compact targeted version (~120 lines)
Added mandatory rule: always use Python scripts for ALL numeric computations (fixed multi-dataset-report mental math error)
Added complete Python script templates for data cleaning, pivot analysis, and multi-dataset analysis
Added American date convention rule (MM/DD/YYYY) with explicit format table
Added instruction to deduplicate before counting cleaning metrics (partially effective)
Added instruction to never write JSON output files directly (use Python script to write them)
Removed unreferenced files: scripts/data-init.sh, scripts/query.sh, WA_Fn-UseC_-Telco-Customer-Churn.csv
remaining_issues: data-clean: model follows task prompt 'counted before dedup' over skill instruction to deduplicate first, resulting in dates_standardized=7 (expected 5) and missing_values=5 (expected 4, within tolerance).
